hook: My landlord said I can't change anything so I showed her what AI thinks it could look like
base_scene: A small cluttered home office with a cheap desk, tangled cables, poor lighting, a window with blinds, a rolling office chair, and a bookshelf against the wall. The room is approximately 10x10 feet with beige carpet. Include everyday items like a coffee mug, a TV remote on the desk, and shoes by the door to make it feel lived-in and relatable.
slide_styles: Current messy dated state — cluttered desk, tangled cables, dim overhead light, papers on floor, worn beige carpet, outdated furniture
Modern Scandinavian transformation — clean white desk, cable management, warm floor lamp, potted plants, light wood accents, fresh white walls, organized shelves
Cozy industrial loft style — exposed brick accent wall, warm Edison bulb lighting, dark metal desk frame with wood top, leather chair, warm rugs, art prints on wall
Minimalist Japanese-inspired — clean low-profile desk, natural wood tones, single plant, soft neutral palette, hidden storage, diffused warm light, calming and uncluttered
Dark moody executive study — rich walnut desk, leather chair, ambient wall sconces, deep charcoal walls, gold accents, built-in bookshelves, warm sophisticated lighting
Bright modern creative studio — standing desk option, colorful organized shelving, mood lighting strips, large monitor setup, plants, motivational art, energetic but clean
caption:
My landlord said I can't change anything so I showed her what AI thinks it could look like

I used an AI room design app and honestly wasn't expecting much but look at this.

#AI #homedecor #fyp #viral #tech
